source.title: The brain's default network: anatomy, function, and relevance to disease
source.venue: Annals of the New York Academy of Sciences

confidence_rationale: Provides anatomical grounding for the 'thought loop' substrate (default network = internal simulation system), and the functional anticorrelation between default network and externally-directed attentional systems supports the loop separation requirement. However, the paper does not address BG gating mechanisms directly, and the mapping to Q-019's three-gate architecture requires a bridging claim (default network is what the thought loop gate regulates). Indirect support; not a direct BG gating paper.

mapping.source_claim_statement: The default network (medial temporal lobe subsystem + medial prefrontal subsystem + posterior cingulate integration hubs) is active during internal simulation, autobiographical memory, and prospective planning. It is strongly anticorrelated with externally-directed attentional networks and minimally connected to primary sensory/motor cortices.
mapping.ree_translation: Default network = anatomical substrate of the thought loop (E3 complex's domain of internally-driven simulation, trajectory planning, and affective weighting). Medial temporal lobe subsystem = hippocampal map function within E3. When sensorium gate opens (salient external cue), it suppresses default network — consistent with sensorium gate deactivating the thought loop. When action commitment gate fires, default network also deactivates as agent transitions from simulation to committed action.
mapping.mapping_caveat: Paper does not address BG gating mechanisms. The claim that default network = thought loop content, regulated by BG gates, requires a bridging step not provided in this paper. Evidence direction marked 'mixed' because the paper supports the existence of the thought-loop substrate but does not speak to its gating by BG loops. High transfer risk from default network function to BG gate architecture.
mapping.source_context: Ann N Y Acad Sci, 2008. Landmark review of default network anatomy and function.

confidence_components.notes: Very high source quality (landmark paper, widely cited). Moderate mapping fidelity — strong for thought-loop content, weak for direct BG gating. Moderate-high transfer risk from default network to gating architecture.
